'''jaluru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zamindar|zamindar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-l-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zamindar|zamindar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jaluru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jælirith|jælirith]] || [[word:jælirij|jælirij]] || [[word:jælirish|jælirish]] || [[word:jæliri|jæliri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jaluluruth|jaluluruth]] || [[word:jaluluruj|jaluluruj]] || [[word:jalulurush|jalulurush]] || [[word:jaluluru|jaluluru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jaluruth|jaluruth]] || [[word:jaluruj|jaluruj]] || [[word:jalurush|jalurush]] || [[word:jaluru|jaluru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jalufruth|jalufruth]] || [[word:jalufruj|jalufruj]] || [[word:jalufrush|jalufrush]] || [[word:jalufruf|jalufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jaluruthu|jaluruthu]] || [[word:jaluruju|jaluruju]] || [[word:jalurushu|jalurushu]] || [[word:jaluruku|jaluruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jaluruth|jaluruth]] || [[word:jaluruj|jaluruj]] || [[word:jalurush|jalurush]] || [[word:jaluru|jaluru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jaluruthul|jaluruthul]] || [[word:jalurujul|jalurujul]] || [[word:jalurushul|jalurushul]] || [[word:jalurukul|jalurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jaluruthuthu|jaluruthuthu]] || [[word:jalurujuju|jalurujuju]] || [[word:jalurushushu|jalurushushu]] || [[word:jaluruku|jaluruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jaluruthun|jaluruthun]] || [[word:jalurujun|jalurujun]] || [[word:jalurushun|jalurushun]] || [[word:jalurukun|jalurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jaluruthuoro|jaluruthuoro]] || [[word:jalurujuoro|jalurujuoro]] || [[word:jalurushuoro|jalurushuoro]] || [[word:jalurukuoro|jalurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
